# CWE-427 negative: helper invoked via absolute binary path (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-427-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os/exec"
)

const pdftopngBinary = "/usr/bin/pdftopng"

func RenderReportPDF(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = r.ParseForm()
	cmd := exec.Command(pdftopngBinary, r.FormValue("input"))
	if err := cmd.Run(); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "render failed", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
